templates.name: Chat RP avancé
templates.description: Chat /me /do avec proximité — template cloud mdcodeV
templates.author: mdcodeV Cloud

files.fxmanifest.lua:
fx_version 'cerulean'
game 'gta5'
lua54 'yes'

name 'cloud-rp-chat'
version '1.0.0'

client_scripts { 'client.lua' }
files.client.lua:
local function proximitySay(message, range)
    local coords = GetEntityCoords(PlayerPedId())
    TriggerServerEvent('cloud-rp-chat:server:proximity', message, coords, range or 15.0)
end

RegisterCommand('me', function(_, args)
    proximitySay(('* %s *'):format(table.concat(args, ' ')), 15.0)
end)

RegisterCommand('do', function(_, args)
    proximitySay(('(( %s ))'):format(table.concat(args, ' ')), 15.0)
end)
files.server.lua:
RegisterNetEvent('cloud-rp-chat:server:proximity', function(message, coords, range)
    local src = source
    TriggerClientEvent('chat:addMessage', -1, { args = { ('[%s]'):format(src), message } })
end)

templates.name: Doorlock ox_lib
templates.description: Système de portes verrouillées avec ox_lib — cloud template
templates.author: mdcodeV Cloud

files.client.lua:
for i, door in ipairs(Config.Doors) do
    RegisterCommand(('door%s'):format(i), function()
        door.locked = not door.locked
        lib.notify({ title = door.label, description = door.locked and 'Verrouillée' or 'Ouverte' })
    end)
end
